Home›Services› Threat Intelligence
Cyber Threat Intelligence

Threat Intelligence
Services & Subscriptions

Actionable intelligence — not raw data. Tactical IOC feeds, finished strategic reports, adversary profiling, and dark web monitoring available as subscriptions or on-demand engagements.

Intelligence You Can Actually Operationalize

Most organizations that buy "threat intelligence" receive overwhelming feeds of uncontextualized indicators that their teams don't have time to validate, enrich, or act on. We produce and deliver intelligence differently — every product is curated, contextualized, and formatted for immediate use in your specific environment, tool stack, and risk profile.

Whether you need a live IOC feed piped directly into your SIEM, a monthly strategic briefing for executive leadership, or a deep-dive adversary profile on the threat groups most likely to target your industry — we have a delivery format and engagement model that fits.

Intelligence Types We Produce

Tactical

Indicators of Compromise (IOCs)

IP addresses, domains, URLs, file hashes, email headers, and YARA rules — validated, deduplicated, and enriched before delivery. Ready for direct SIEM, EDR, and firewall ingestion.

Technical

TTPs & Attack Signatures

MITRE ATT&CK-mapped techniques, tools, and procedures used by active threat actors — with Sigma rules, Snort/Suricata signatures, and detection logic ready for deployment.

Operational

Campaign & Actor Intelligence

Active campaign tracking, infrastructure mapping, and actor attribution — who is targeting your sector, what tools they use, and what their infrastructure looks like right now.

Strategic

Executive Threat Briefings

Written for decision-makers, not analysts. Quarterly geopolitical threat context, industry risk landscape, and strategic recommendations in non-technical language for board and C-suite consumption.

🔍 Dark Web & Underground Monitoring

We monitor criminal forums, paste sites, Telegram channels, dark web marketplaces, and closed threat actor communities for mentions of your organization, executives, IP ranges, domains, credentials, and proprietary data. When we find something, you hear about it within hours — not days.

  • Credential exposure monitoring — employee email/password combinations appearing in breach data
  • Brand and domain impersonation detection across typosquatting and phishing infrastructure
  • Executive personal information exposure (doxxing, leaked PII, family data)
  • Ransomware group targeting chatter and pre-attack reconnaissance indicators
  • Stolen data listings — source code, customer records, internal documents
  • Initial access broker advertisements targeting your industry or infrastructure

Intelligence Delivery Formats

  • STIX/TAXII feed — Machine-readable structured intelligence consumable by any SIEM, TIP, or SOAR platform
  • CSV/JSON IOC export — Flat file delivery on a defined schedule for manual or automated import
  • SIEM watchlist push — Direct integration into Splunk, Sentinel, or Elastic — no analyst action required
  • Intelligence portal — Private web portal with searchable reports, actor profiles, and IOC lookup
  • Analyst briefing — Live or recorded monthly/quarterly briefing with Q&A from our CTI team
  • PDF/DOCX finished reports — Formatted intelligence products for distribution to leadership and legal teams
  • API access — RESTful API for custom integrations with internal tooling and dashboards

Intelligence Sources

  • Dark web forums & markets
  • Ransomware leak sites
  • Telegram threat actor channels
  • OSINT & passive DNS
  • Honeypot sensor networks
  • Malware sandbox analysis
  • ISAC / government feeds
  • Human intelligence (HUMINT)

Intelligence Platforms

  • MISP (Threat Sharing)
  • OpenCTI
  • ThreatConnect
  • Recorded Future
  • VirusTotal Enterprise
  • Maltego

Purchase Intelligence

Subscribe to a monthly feed, buy a one-time adversary report, or engage our CTI team for custom requirements.

Get Started 301-352-4855
Intelligence Subscriptions
Buy Threat Intelligence

Structured subscription tiers designed for organizations at different stages of intelligence program maturity — from tactical IOC feeds through fully managed CTI programs.

Tactical Feed

IOC Subscription

Starting at $495/mo
  • Daily curated IOC feed (IP, domain, hash, URL)
  • STIX/TAXII + CSV/JSON delivery
  • Validated & deduplicated before delivery
  • Enriched with context (malware family, actor, campaign)
  • SIEM watchlist push available (add-on)
  • 30-day lookback historical access
  • Email alert on high-confidence critical IOCs
Subscribe
⭐ Most Popular — Operational Intelligence

CTI Program Subscription

Starting at $1,495/mo
  • Everything in IOC Subscription
  • Weekly operational intelligence digest
  • Active campaign tracking for your industry sector
  • Threat actor profile library (updated monthly)
  • TTP mapping to MITRE ATT&CK with detection recommendations
  • Dark web credential monitoring for your domains
  • Monthly analyst briefing (60 min, live)
  • Intelligence portal access with search & reporting
  • SIEM watchlist push included
Subscribe
Managed CTI Program

Enterprise Intelligence

Starting at $4,995/mo
  • Everything in CTI Program Subscription
  • Dedicated CTI analyst assigned to your account
  • Custom intelligence requirements (PIRs) development
  • Full dark web & underground monitoring suite
  • Executive brand monitoring (personal data, doxxing)
  • Ransomware targeting chatter & pre-attack indicators
  • Quarterly strategic threat briefing for board/C-suite
  • Custom adversary reports on request (2/quarter included)
  • API access for custom integrations
  • Incident support priority queue
  • Intelligence integrated into SOAR playbooks
Contact Us
On-Demand Intelligence Products
Buy a Single Intelligence Report

Don't need a subscription? Purchase individual finished intelligence products without a recurring commitment.

From $995 — One-Time

Adversary Profile Report

Deep-dive finished intelligence product on a specific threat actor group — infrastructure, tooling, TTPs, victim targeting criteria, and defensive recommendations tailored to your environment.

From $1,495 — One-Time

Dark Web Exposure Assessment

Point-in-time sweep of dark web, criminal forums, paste sites, and data markets for your organization's credentials, data, and infrastructure. Full findings report with remediation guidance.

From $2,495 — One-Time

Industry Threat Landscape Report

Finished strategic intelligence report on the threat landscape for your specific industry vertical — top threat actors, recent campaigns, and recommended defensive priorities for the next 12 months.

Custom Pricing

Custom Intelligence Requirement

Have a specific intelligence need that doesn't fit a standard product? Our CTI analysts can scope and deliver custom research — technical, geopolitical, or human-source intelligence on defined requirements.
